rationale: This is a live-action/3D-render slapstick skit borrowed from the Gardenscapes playbook — palette, character (real human + cat), and tone have zero overlap with Paper.io 2's bright, minimalist top-down arcade DNA. The hook also tells viewers nothing about drawing trails or capturing territory, so even if curiosity drives the click, install-to-engagement will collapse on a snackable .io loop. Skip unless you're willing to fund a custom shoot AND bolt on a clear gameplay payoff in seconds 3-6, which isn't justified by a single 380-day-old reference creative.
